title: Notice of Office Closure 21 (PDF)
text:
NOTICE OF OFFICE CLOSURE
This notice serves to inform industry and all clients of the Vanuatu Financial
Services Commission that the Companies House will be closed for business on
Friday 26th November 2021.
We apologies for any inconvenience this may cause. The Companies House will
be open again for business on Tuesday 30th November 2021
We thank you for your continued support and understanding.
Yours Sincerely,
Branan Karae
Commissioner
________________________________________________________________
LA FERMETURE
Cette note sert á vous informer á tous et á toutes nos clientele de Commission
des Affaires Financiaires de Vanuatu que le bureau sera fermer pour le business
le 26 Novembre 2021
Nous nous excusons pour les Dérangment. Le bureau sera ouvert pour le
business le 30 Novembre 2021
Nous vous remercions pour votre comprehension.
Branan Karae
Commissaire
